title: mesites #3316
definition:
1) one who intervenes between two, either in order to make or
    restore peace and friendship, or form a compact, or for
    ratifying a covenant
 2) a medium of communication, arbitrator
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) one who intervenes between two, either in order to make or
    restore peace and friendship, or form a compact, or for
    ratifying a covenant
 2) a medium of communication, arbitrator

    NASB:  an arbitrator, a mediator:
